subcodes.first_line: O my companions and friends! During the days of Riḍván, you held a celebration and arranged a feast where melodies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و دوستان من در ایام رضوان جشنی برپا نمودید و بزمی آراستید که آهنگ
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @music and singing, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
